page_content:
154 ENAE - Engineering, Aerospace

ENAE441 Space Navigation and Guidance (3 Credits)

Principles of navigation. Celestial, radio, and inertial navigation schemes. Navigational and guidance requirements for orbital, planetary, and atmospheric entry missions. Fundamentals of communications and information theory. Link budgets, antennas and telemetry systems. Prerequisite: ENAE404 and ENAE432.

Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Aerospace program; or permission of ENGR-Aerospace Engineering department.
